# NADPH formation in photosynthesis

## Short Teaching Summary
NADPH formation in photosynthesis: Electrons travel through the chloroplast electron transport chain to photosystem I (PSI), which reduces NADP+ to NADPH. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
